title: Workflow Dependency Map — Core Batch Workflows
content:
Core batch workflow dependency chain (upstream → downstream):

1. Input_File_Generator → Claims_Processing_Daily → Report_Aggregator → Email_Notification
2. Input_File_Generator → Policy_Renewal_Batch → Premium_Calculation
3. Data_Validation_Check → Claims_Processing_Daily
4. Agent_Commission_Report runs independently (weekly Monday 07:00)
5. Document_OCR_Pipeline runs continuously, independent of batch workflows

When investigating cascade failures, always trace upstream first. Use get_workflow_dependencies to map the chain, then check_workflow_status on each upstream workflow.

Shared resources:
- /data/claims/ — used by Claims_Processing_Daily and Report_Aggregator
- /data/policies/ — used by Policy_Renewal_Batch and Premium_Calculation
- PostgreSQL claims_db — used by Claims_Processing_Daily, Reconciliation_Daily
